name: affinescript-mcp
description: AffineScript language cartridge -- type checking, parsing, formatting, linting, compiling, hover/goto-def/completion queries, error explanation, stdlib browsing, and syntax reference for the AffineScript language (substructural type system with affine/linear types, algebraic effects)

tools.name: affinescript_check
tools.description: Type-check AffineScript source code and return structured JSON diagnostics (errors, warnings, hints). Invokes the compiler's check mode with --json output.

filename.description: Virtual filename for error reporting (default: input.as)

tools.name: affinescript_parse
tools.description: Parse AffineScript source and return a structured AST summary (top-level declarations, types, functions, effects)

tools.name: affinescript_format
tools.description: Format AffineScript source code according to the standard style

use_tabs.description: Use tabs instead of spaces (default: false)

tools.name: affinescript_explain_error
tools.description: Explain an AffineScript error code with description, example, and fix suggestions. Error codes: E0xxx (parse), E1xxx (type), E2xxx (borrow), E3xxx (effect), E4xxx (quantity), E5xxx (name), E6xxx (refinement), Wxxx (warning), Lxxx (lint)

tools.name: affinescript_stdlib
tools.description: Browse AffineScript standard library types and functions. Search by name or category.

query.description: Search query (type name, function name, or category like 'collections', 'io', 'effects')

category.description: Filter by category: types, functions, effects, traits

tools.name: affinescript_syntax_ref
tools.description: Get syntax reference for an AffineScript language construct (keywords, operators, declarations, patterns, effects, quantities)

tools.name: affinescript_snippet
tools.description: Evaluate a small AffineScript expression or snippet in the interpreter and return the result

source.description: AffineScript expression or snippet to evaluate

tools.name: affinescript_lint
tools.description: Lint AffineScript source code for code quality issues (naming conventions, dead code, style). Returns structured JSON diagnostics.

filename.description: Virtual filename for diagnostic reporting (default: input.as)

tools.name: affinescript_compile
tools.description: Compile AffineScript source to a target (wasm, wasm-gc, julia). Returns structured JSON diagnostics and reports whether compilation succeeded.

filename.description: Virtual filename for diagnostic reporting (default: input.as)

tools.name: affinescript_hover
tools.description: Return type and symbol information for the symbol at a cursor position in AffineScript source code. Runs the full pipeline (parse → resolve → typecheck) and returns JSON hover info.

tools.name: affinescript_goto_def
tools.description: Return the definition location of the symbol at a cursor position in AffineScript source code. Returns JSON with file, line, and column of the definition site.

tools.name: affinescript_complete
tools.description: Return completion candidates at a cursor position in AffineScript source code. Returns a JSON array of items with name, kind, type, and detail fields.
